heading: Naga caawi si aan cilladaha u heshelno si dhakhso ah
description: Warbixintaadu waxay abuuraysaa arji GitHub oo ay dib u eegaan ilaaliyaha.
safetyWarning: Warbixintan u hay ammaan dadweynaha. Ha ku darin macluumaad shakhsi ah, cinwaanno iimaylka, lambarada taleefanka, cinwaanno guri/shaqo, ama sir akoonti.
screenshotsPlaceholder: Ku dhaji xiriiriyaha sawirrada shaashadda, muuqaallada, ama faylasha daruuraha
errorApi404: API-ga warbixinta cilladdu kuma jirto deegaankan. Haddii aad si hoose u tijaabinayso, isticmaal bogga la geeyay.
errorApi403: Asalkan looma ogola in uu soo gudbiyo warbixinaha cilladda. Hubi APP_ORIGINS ee deegaanka backend-kaaga.
errorApi500: Adeegga warbixinta cilladdu weli lama habeynin. Xaqiiji tiikniga GitHub iyo doorsoonyada deegaanka repo-ga.
errorApi502: Abuuritaanka arjiga GitHub wuu fashilmay. Mar kale isku day daqiiqad kadib.
errorApiGeneric: Hadda ma soo gudbin karno warbixintaada cilladda (HTTP {{status}}).
errorNetwork: Khalad shabakad oo ku saabsan soo gudbinta warbixinta cilladda. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo mar kale isku day.
errorGeneric: Wax baa qalday. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
successMessage: Arjiga #{{number}} si guul ah ayaa loo abuuray waxaana diyaar u ah dib u eegis.
